'''Notak''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stronghold throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Battle of Notak|fell]] eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

{{Planet-stub}}
